text:
Arms stretched out wide, Jaedyn Shaw beamed as she danced to the edge of the pitch, leaping into the arms of her teammates on the U.S. women芒聙聶s national team. A familiar San Diego crowd boomed as the teenager basked in the glory of her first USWNT goal, which came just three days after her debut with the team in October 2023. It was a storybook start to the San Diego Wave star芒聙聶s international career, but it also marked a watershed moment in Shaw芒聙聶s meteoric rise.脗

Less than a year after her inaugural USWNT cap and goal, Shaw is heading to her first Olympic Games at just 19 years old. She芒聙聶s long dreamed of representing Team USA on the world stage芒聙聰and Shaw enters Paris not merely as a member of new coach Emma Hayes芒聙聶s roster, but as the team芒聙聶s 2024 leading goalscorer.

芒聙聹It芒聙聶s going to be so cool to compete for a gold medal 芒聙娄 it doesn't even feel real to even say that out loud. It means so much to me, so much to my family, being amulticultural and biracial family,芒聙聺 says Shaw, who is the first Vietnamese-American to represent the USWNT.脗

Following a successful youth career, Shaw芒聙聶s rapid rise isn芒聙聶t exactly surprising, but ascending at such a velocity could be dizzying for even the most composed of players. That芒聙聶s why many around her act as a gravitational force, encouraging her to slow down and take in the moment. Longtime USWNT star and San Diego Wave captain Alex Morgan has been one of those guiding voices, helping Shaw zone in and maintain focus. (Morgan will not be with the USWNT in Paris, failing to make theOlympic rosterfor the first time since 2008.)脗

芒聙聹Alex has told me a couple times to enjoy the moment and take it in. And also just work as hard as you can,芒聙聺 says Shaw.脗

Shaw took Morgan芒聙聶s advice, making the most of those early national team call-ups to become the first USWNT player to score five goals in her first five starts. On a team that芒聙聶s notoriously difficult to break into, the historic stretch helped establish her as a near lock for the Olympics芒聙聰in a deep attacking pool no less. Talk to those around Shaw, though, and they say there is still more to come, having yet to hit her seemingly sky-high ceiling.

芒聙聹She芒聙聶s open to challenges, she芒聙聶s very humble, she芒聙聶s hardworking, she wants to be better,芒聙聺 then-interim USWNT head coach Twila Kilgore said following April芒聙聶s SheBelieves Cup semifinal. 芒聙聹And while the world is saying, 芒聙聵Yeah, she芒聙聶s here and she芒聙聶s arrived,芒聙聶 and I agree she芒聙聶s doing a great job, be patient because there芒聙聶s more.芒聙聺

Shaw remembers talking with Kilgore a couple of days later about her remarks. 芒聙聹It was just basically saying we芒聙聶re not jumping into anything and this isn芒聙聶t something that芒聙聶s being forced on me and this isn芒聙聶t a pressure thing, this is more just relax and enjoy the moment because there is more to come. This is, just like she said, scratching the surface 芒聙娄 There is a new chapter after this.芒聙聺脗

Back in this current chapter, Shaw finds herself under the stewardship of Hayes, who is eager to turn a new leaf as she ushers in the team芒聙聶s next generation. The 19-year-old is part of a young core芒聙聰including 24-year-old Naomi Girma, 23-year-old Sophia Smith and 22-year-old Trinity Rodman芒聙聰that will be responsible for curating a new identity and charting a path forward for the U.S. following a disappointing Tokyo Olympics and 2023 World Cup. Only eight players remain from the 2020 Summer Games, with nine first-time Olympians heading to Paris.

Tactically, Shaw fits Hayes芒聙聶s system well, a flexible player able to command multiple positions as a forward and attacking midfielder. 芒聙聹I like all of the positions, as long as I am high up the field, close to the goal. I have never complained about my position,芒聙聺 says Shaw.脗

It芒聙聶s clear, however, that her most effective and preferred spot on the pitch is the No. 10, with Shaw able to drop into the midfield and add dynamism to the U.S.芒聙聶s attack. She says she likes to drift centrally too, explaining matter-of-factly that it芒聙聶s simply because 芒聙聹the goal is in the middle.芒聙聺 Shaw芒聙聶s magnetic pull toward the back of the net is welcome, especially considering the USWNT芒聙聶s recent scoring woes.

芒聙聹Looking in the last 10, 11 months, you look at Jaedyn芒聙聶s goal contributions, her goal involvements for the national team and it芒聙聶s been significant,芒聙聺 said Hayes after announcing the U.S. Olympic roster in June. 芒聙聹She is a player that can play across the front line, extremely creative. Hold-up play is exceptional, no matter who she goes against, she芒聙聶s so strong to keep players off of her and her ability to make a final pass or be deadly in the final third is something that芒聙聶s really impressed me.芒聙聺

To Hayes芒聙聶s point, Shaw isn芒聙聶tjusta goalscorer, her field vision has been praised by many, including formerWave coach Casey Stoney, who called her through ball one of the sport芒聙聶s best. It芒聙聶s a skill Shaw says she actually honed growing up playing futsal (a five-a-side game similar to soccer that芒聙聶s played indoors, typically on a hardcourt).脗

芒聙聹My futsal team played a little bit of a different formation than the traditional diamond that you would normally play in futsal,芒聙聺 says Shaw. 芒聙聹We played a 2芒聙聯2, so it was like a box and I played in the back so I always had to find that open pass or the through pass, but it芒聙聶s super tight. I built that vision there because it芒聙聶s a lot tighter and you have to see it right on and play it right away.芒聙聺脗

Other parts of Shaw芒聙聶s game have taken time and exposure to professional environments to develop. After two years in the NWSL and 14 appearances with the USWNT, Shaw has started to invite more responsibility with her growing confidence empowering her 芒聙聹to rely on myself and just jump into more of a leadership role.芒聙聺脗

In recounting her journey to soccer stardom, Shaw is quick to credit her family, sprinkling in charming anecdotes about their abiding support. 芒聙聹My mom is so excited, she is speaking in French already,芒聙聺 Shaw says lovingly, adding that her accent will need polishing ahead of the Summer Games. She also boasts about her 11-year-old brother芒聙聶s first home run and describes the batting cage her mom built for him in the backyard.

Shaw芒聙聶s entire family moved from Dallas to San Diego after she went pro, joining the NWSL芒聙聶s Wave in 2022 as a 17-year-old. She lives under the same roof as her mom, dad and younger brother, while her older sister lives in downtown San Diego, only a 25-minute drive away. 芒聙聹They don芒聙聶t see me as 芒聙聵the soccer player芒聙聶 芒聙娄 they see me as me, Jaedyn Shaw,芒聙聺 she says. 芒聙聹Coming home to that helps keep me grounded and in the moment. They're so proud so it just helps me kind of enjoy those little moments and want to do more.芒聙聺

While she admits that there are some natural growing pains living with her family as she hurdles toward 20, Shaw is ultimately grateful to be able to share the beginning of her professional journey with them, especially her brother. 芒聙聹He sees women芒聙聶s sports as like this is it, this is the top level. He plays baseball, and he only watches MLB and the NWSL. He plays FIFA with the girls,芒聙聺 says Shaw. 芒聙聹That芒聙聶s what I want for the community and I want to be able to give people that experience.芒聙聺脗

Soon Shaw will play on the biggest stage of her young career, and she芒聙聶ll need to call on these formative experiences under the brightest of lights. But like a rocketship shooting into the stratosphere, Shaw and those closest to her are sure to be cautious of burnout. It芒聙聶s telling that at her young age, and amid a successful career to this point, Shaw knows the highest of highs can芒聙聶t be maintained. Inevitably lows will come. That芒聙聶s why she embraces the calls to submit to the moment, with the future idling in her peripheral vision. Lucky for Shaw, the present moment is a pretty thrilling one. The world will soon get a look at the next era of the USWNT, featuring Shaw as a lethal x-factor. And should all go according to plan, the 2024 Olympics will be the first of many major tournaments for the 19-year-old, as she and her teammates make this iteration of the USWNT their own.脗

As Shaw says, 芒聙聹This is just the beginning.芒聙聺脗

Brennan has a bachelor芒聙聶s in international studies from the University of Wisconsin and a master芒聙聶s in art history from Wayne State University.

title: The Olympics Are Just the Beginning for Young USWNT Star Jaedyn Shaw
description: The 19-year-old, who scored five goals in her first five starts with the national team, is only scratching the surface of her potential.脗聽
